pages.text: The absolute pinnacle of their engineering. The $(item)Pyramid Core$() is the heart of the alien pyramid structure. It $(alien)resonates$() with reality, generating $(l:patchouli:materials/neutrion)Entropy$() that flows through $(l:patchouli:machines/entropy_cables)Entropy Cables$(/l) to power your machines.

pages.title: Activation
pages.text: The Core remains dormant until built into a massive pyramidal structure. Once built, it must be ignited by consuming $(item)Entropy Biomass$() or touched by an $(l:patchouli:tools/ancient_ankh)Ancient Ankh$(/l).$()$()$(br)$()With $(item)Inertial Stability Alloy$() in the fuel slot, the pyramid produces entropy $(4)CONTINUOUSLY$() until deactivated!

pages.name: Pyramid Tier 1
pages.text: Tier 1 Structure:$(br)$- Base: 3x3 $(gold)Gold Blocks$()$(br)- Layer 2: 5x5 $(alien)Alien Pyramid Casing$()$(br)$()$(4)MACHINES USE ENTROPY DIRECTLY$()$(br)$()This is the entry-level pyramid. Machines connected to it consume Entropy directly.

pages.name: Pyramid Tier 2
pages.text: Tier 2 Structure:$(br)$- Base: 3x3 $(5)Neutrion Blocks$()$(br)- Layer 2: 7x7 $(alien)Alien Pyramid Casing$()$(br)$()$(4)MACHINES CAN USE FE$()$(br)$()With Tier 2, the entropy is converted internally, allowing machines to use standard $(6)Forge Energy (FE)$() instead of raw entropy!

pages.name: Pyramid Tier 3
pages.text: Tier 3 Structure:$(br)$- Base: 3x3 $(5)Neutrion Blocks$()$(br)- Layer 2: 9x9 $(alien)Alien Pyramid Casing$()$(br)$()$(4)MAXIMUM POWER$()$(br)$()The ultimate alien structure. Provides the highest entropy generation rate and full FE conversion for all connected machines.

pages.title: Entropy Flow
pages.text: The pyramid generates entropy that flows through $(l:patchouli:machines/entropy_cables)Entropy Cables$(/l) to an $(l:patchouli:machines/entropy_reservoir)Entropy Reservoir$(), which then distributes power to your machines.$()$(br)$()Owner System: Only the player who activates the pyramid can extract its entropy!
